base_items.reason: Meeting participation always starts with a verified browser join backend.
base_items.setup_hint: Use the meeting-browser-driver with a valid meeting URL.

base_items.reason: The runtime needs a virtual audio bus to listen to the meeting and route audio back if speaking is enabled.
base_items.setup_hint: Use BlackHole on macOS or PulseAudio null sink on Linux.

base_items.reason: Audio bus negotiation and device probing depend on ffmpeg.
base_items.setup_hint: Install ffmpeg before launching the meeting flow.

base_items.reason: The meeting flow listens first and extracts a transcript for follow-up work.
base_items.setup_hint: Set `KYBERION_STT_COMMAND` or use the stub transcript path for dry runs.

allowed_items.reason: This profile allows speaking, so a TTS path is required.
allowed_items.setup_hint: Set `KYBERION_TTS_COMMAND` and verify the chosen voice profile before joining.

allowed_items.reason: Speaking uses a promoted runtime voice profile.
allowed_items.setup_hint: Select an active voice profile id from the registry.

allowed_items.reason: Speaking into a meeting requires mission-scoped voice consent.
allowed_items.setup_hint: Create or verify `evidence/voice-consent.json` for the active mission.

blocked_items.reason: Speaking was requested, but the current profile does not grant automatic speaking authority.
blocked_items.setup_hint: Ask for an explicit authority boundary or rerun with a speaking-enabled profile.

blocked_items.reason: A speaking request cannot proceed until speaking authority is granted.
blocked_items.setup_hint: Choose the runtime voice profile only after the speaking boundary is explicit.

blocked_items.reason: Voice consent is only needed once speaking is actually authorized.
blocked_items.setup_hint: Record mission-scoped voice consent after the speaking boundary is approved.

required_item.reason: The request explicitly mentions camera or video participation.
required_item.setup_hint: Select a host camera or virtual camera backend before joining.

recommended_item.reason: This meeting may benefit from visible participation, but camera is not mandatory unless explicitly requested.
recommended_item.setup_hint: Enable a virtual camera only if the meeting will be video-on.

not_needed_item.reason: No camera/video signal was present in the request, so audio-only participation is sufficient.

required_item.reason: The request explicitly mentions screen sharing.
required_item.setup_hint: Prepare screen-sharing permissions or a screen capture bridge before the meeting starts.

recommended_item.reason: The agenda looks presentation-heavy, so screen sharing may become useful.
recommended_item.setup_hint: Have screen-sharing permissions ready if a slide or demo handoff appears.

not_needed_item.reason: No screen-sharing signal was present in the request.

questions.camera_recommended: Will this meeting be video-on, or should Kyberion stay audio-only?
questions.screen_share_recommended: Will screen sharing or slides be needed?
questions.speaking_blocked: Should Kyberion be allowed to speak in this meeting?
